title: Container Storage Interface (CSI)
description: Master the Container Storage Interface (CSI) for dynamic volume provisioning in Kubernetes. Analyze the trade-offs of Block (EBS), File (EFS), and Object storage for stateful applications in cloud-native environments.
objectives: Master the Container Storage Interface (CSI) for dynamic volume provisioning in Kubernetes.
Analyze the trade-offs of Block (EBS), File (EFS), and Object storage for stateful applications in cloud-native environments.
